APPEARANCES - ATTY. JAMES P. WATSON, TEL. NO. 585-2553 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
MONICA MARTINEZ, TEL. NO. 684-6670, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED BECAUSE IT DID NOT TELL MS.
